prompt:
Theme Direction: Oriental Zen Minimalist Poster
Style Branch: High contrast, bright type
Main Subject: A silhouette of a person carrying a bright red oil-paper umbrella passing in front of a white wall
Emotional Motif: After the rain, subtle, stillness with a story
Scenes and Imagery: Warm white wall, bright red oil-paper umbrella, cobalt blue reflections on the ground after rain, a few bamboo shadows
Composition and Space: One-corner whitespace composition, character located at the lower side of the frame, the white wall occupies a large area, ground forms small amount of blue reflections
Color Control: Warm white for walls and whitespace, bright red only for the umbrella, cobalt blue for reflections on the ground after rain, dark green for minimal bamboo shadows; avoid the whole picture turning red or blue being too heavy
Light and Texture: Natural light after rain, light texture on the wall, slight reflection on the ground, clear edges
Aspect Ratio: 9:16
Additional Requirements: Keep the character as a simple silhouette, the umbrella is the primary visual point, the picture is bright and clean, with a modern Chinese style cover feel
